description_long: This bungalow features a single-story structure with a dark hip roof and light-colored exterior walls. The front of the house includes a covered porch with visible railings and potted plants, while the rear opens to a fenced backyard with a uniquely shaped swimming pool and two large leafy trees. The property is surrounded by a white picket fence, and there is a poolside lounge chair and a bench for relaxation. Large windows are present on multiple sides, allowing ample natural light into the interior. The overall design is compact and modern, with a focus on outdoor leisure and open space.
description: A single-story bungalow with a dark hip roof, light exterior walls, a covered porch, and a fenced backyard featuring a pool and trees.
description_view_0: Side view showing the pool, two large trees, and the rear of the bungalow with a white picket fence.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the covered porch, main entrance, and the backyard with pool and trees in the background.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the pool, bench, and the side wall of the bungalow with windows.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the pool, trees, and the back facade with large windows and fencing.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped side and rear windows
